# Agent notes for GitHub Actions `steps` context

This file previously duplicated sections of the public GitHub Actions documentation for the `steps` context.
To avoid maintaining copied documentation and to respect GitHub’s documentation licensing, the content has been removed.

If you need details about the `steps` context, please refer to the official documentation:
- https://docs.github.com/actions/learn-github-actions/contexts#steps-context

At the time of writing, this repository does not use this file as an input to any automation or tooling.
If you introduce tooling that consumes `.github/agents/my-agent.agent.md`, document that usage here instead of copying upstream docs.

_Portions of the behavior described by this file are defined by GitHub Actions and documented by GitHub, Inc. See the official documentation above for the authoritative specification._
